description: Deel is a workforce platform for hiring, payroll, HR, compliance, and related global employment operations. It lets companies manage contracts, workers, payroll workflows, and associated workforce data across countries.
summary: Deel exposes a REST API at `https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2` and an MCP server at `https://api.letsdeel.com/mcp`; both use bearer access tokens, with REST also documented for OAuth2 app-based access and MCP supporting OAuth discovery plus PAT fallback.
